hero.description: Wide-angle or overhead completed project. Clean, sharp, green against dark mulch or stone.

portfolio.description: Before/after pairs or completed project shots. Each labeled with category (landscape-design, hardscaping, irrigation, lawn-care, sod).

team.description: Owner headshot or team photo. Outdoor preferred. No suit and tie.

in_progress.description: Crew working on a project — shows professionalism and scale.

equipment.description: Branded truck or equipment — reinforces local, established operator.
